text:
文档平台 Mintlify 发了一篇工程博客，讲了一件挺有意思的事：他们给自家 AI 文档助手造了一套假的文件系统，叫 ChromaFs，让 AI 以为自己在用 grep、cat、ls 这些命令浏览文件，实际上每个命令都被拦截、翻译成了数据库查询。

效果很直接：会话启动时间从原来沙箱方案的 46 秒降到 100 https://t.co/oSoziZerxn

充分利用 AI 情绪提升生成结果的 Prompt 应用案例：

先让 AI 扮演仇人挑刺，AI 给出犀利又中肯的意见；然后基于这些意见去写一版本更好的气死仇人 

可能 AI 明白了什么是同仇敌忾😂 https://t.co/LB6Tea4wHX

Likely the most widely-distributed photograph in history, the original Blue Marble, taken by an unknown astronaut in 1972 from Apollo 17, and becoming the model for many images of Earth. 

Now we have a sequel, from Artemis (the second image). Other photos in the quote tweet. https://t.co/pNQXRyaP4F

The new Grok Imagine model is particularly good when you use the LLM to help write or refine prompts ✨

I often start with something simple, take the output to Chat, and ask for help iterating on an edit or enhancement.

You end up with something much more detailed! https://t.co/184FKsgFFV
